metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 5 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语五年级下册

unit1.name: What a mess
unit1.topic: 学习整理房间和物品归属

sentences.english: Put your socks in the drawer.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Tom, your room is a mess!

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Sorry, Mum. Let me tidy up.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: No, it's not mine. It's Peter's.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK. Put it in his bag.

unit2.name: Watch it grow
unit2.topic: 学习描述自然变化和原因

sentences.english: The bird is building a nest.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: It might be the lorries outside.

unit4.name: The magic stone
unit4.topic: 学习杰克与魔豆故事中的词汇

sentences.english: They live in a big castle.
sentences.chinese: 他们住在一个大城堡里。

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Don't worry, Mum. I'll sell the cow.

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Look, I got some magic beans!

unit5.name: A party for animals
unit5.topic: 学习动物和乐器相关词汇

sentences.english: The animals are having a party.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Thank you! What can we do here?

lines.speaker: Dog
lines.text: We can play instruments and dance!

sentences.english: My favourite festival is the Spring Festival.
We eat dumplings at Chinese New Year.
We eat mooncakes at Mid-autumn Festival.

lines.speaker: Lily
lines.text: The Spring Festival. What about you?

unit7.name: My future
unit7.topic: 学习谈论未来和职业规划

sentences.english: What will you be in the future?

sentences.chinese: 机器人将会做很多事情。

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: What will you be in the future, Amy?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Because I want to help people.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: That's great! You need to study hard.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I want to buy a sweater.

lines.speaker: Shopkeeper
lines.text: Here you are. Try it on.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: It fits well. I'll take it.

unit9.name: Seeing the doctor
unit9.topic: 学习身体不适和就医相关词汇

sentences.english: Take this medicine three times a day.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: I have a headache and a fever.

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.text: Let me check. Oh, you have a cold.

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.text: Yes, take this medicine three times a day.

unit10.name: Great inventions
unit10.topic: 学习中国古代四大发明

sentences.english: The compass was invented long ago.
sentences.chinese: 指南针是很久以前发明的。
今天每个人都在使用纸。

sentences.english: Gunpowder was used in ancient China.
sentences.chinese: 火药在中国古代被使用。

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: We learned about the Four Great Inventions.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Paper, printing, the compass and gunpowder.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Well done! Do you know who invented paper?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: It was Cai Lun in ancient China.

unit11.name: Chinese festivals
unit11.topic: 深入学习中国传统节日文化

sentences.english: We celebrate Chinese New Year in February.
Lantern Festival is in February or March.
We eat zongzi on Dragon Boat Festival.

lines.speaker: Li Hua
lines.text: Grandma, what do we do at the Spring Festival?

lines.speaker: Grandma
lines.text: We clean the house and decorate it.

lines.speaker: Grandma
lines.text: We make dumplings and give red envelopes.

unit12.name: The giant's garden
unit12.topic: 学习王尔德童话中的词汇

sentences.english: The giant has a beautiful garden.
sentences.chinese: 巨人有一个美丽的花园。

sentences.english: The children can play in the garden now.
sentences.chinese: 孩子们现在可以在花园里玩了。

sentences.english: Spring is the most beautiful season.
Knock on the door before you enter.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The giant's garden was cold and dark.

lines.speaker: Giant
lines.text: No one can come into my garden!

lines.speaker: Children
lines.text: Please let us play in your garden.

lines.speaker: Giant
lines.text: OK, you can come in. Let's share the garden.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Now the garden is beautiful and full of happiness.
